title: Feature request: For loops with a variable in the end-condition
body:
This works:
`for(i=0;i<10;i++) ...`

but this does not work:
`wire [4:0] variable;`
`for(i=0;i<variable;i++) ..`

It fails with the error:

> ERROR: 2nd expression of generate for-loop is not constant!

This is valid RTL in most other tools, and can be used to save some code implementing more tricky cases.
